case_title: INNOCENT OKORONKWO VS. EDUARDO PANIAGUA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-12-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-13-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO ASTURIAS, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$28.00) SERVED NOV-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ASTURIAS, ELENA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$28.00) SERVED NOV-14-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO
DECLARATION OF SC-150 REQUEST TO POSTPONE FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELENA ASTURIAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ARRIVED AT 10:25AM THEN THE DEFENDANT HAD ALREADY LEFT THE COURTROOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. THE COURT ORDERS THAT INNOCENT OKORONKWO IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR:JOHN OKORONKWO.
